channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran live updates: US official confirms Iranian drone struck ship in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: U.S. and Iranian delegations began talks in Switzerland on Sunday.

item.title: Trump's focus on SAVE America Act creates congressional deadlock
item.description: The president and his conservative allies have blocked other legislation while unsuccessfully pushing a voting bill that lacks sufficient support.

item.title: American tourist describes shaking floor during Venezuela earthquakes
item.description: Two strong earthquakes struck Venezuela's coast Wednesday evening, damaging buildings in the capital and briefly triggering a tsunami advisory.

item.title: Six-alarm fire destroys old industrial building in Allentown, Pennsylvania
item.description: A large fire in Allentown, Pennsylvania, forced nearby residents to evacuate their homes Wednesday night.
